title: Anthropic AI Safety Fellow
location: London, UK; Ontario, CAN; Remote-Friendly, United States; San Francisco, CA
required_qualifications: Available to work full-time on the Fellows program for 4 months
Have work authorization in the US, UK, or Canada and be located in that country during the program
Strong technical background in computer science, mathematics, physics, cybersecurity, or related fields
Ability to implement ideas quickly and communicate clearly
preferred_qualifications: Experience with empirical ML research projects
Experience working with Large Language Models
Experience in research areas like Scalable Oversight, Adversarial Robustness, Model Organisms, or Mechanistic Interpretability
Experience with deep learning frameworks and experiment management
responsibilities: Work on an empirical project aligned with Anthropic's research priorities
Use external infrastructure (open-source models, public APIs) for research
Produce a public output such as a paper submission
Undergo project selection and mentor matching process
education: Bachelor's degree in a related field or equivalent experience mentioned as typical, though the program is open regardless of previous experience levels
